title: DPHCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 23 Technical and Non-Technical Posts
post_name: Junior Engineer, Accounts Officer, Junior Assistant and More Posts
short_info: The Delhi Police Housing Corporation Limited (DPHCL) has officially announced the Junior Engineer, Accounts Officer, Junior Assistant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 with 23 openings. The detailed notification was published at dphc.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 53 years and hold Graduate/Diploma in Engineering with relevant experience can now submit their offline applications from now to 22 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 53 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Diploma in Engineering with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Junior Engineer (Civil): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Electrical): Diploma in Electrical Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Electrical Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Planning): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Stores): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Junior Engineer (Billing & Contract): Diploma in Civil Engineering with 3 years experience in the field of Civil Engineering / Construction / Surveying / Contract Administration. Assistant Engineer (Administration): Graduate in any discipline with 5 years experience in official Administration / Establishment / Accounts / Audit / Contract Administration. Accounts Officer: Graduate in any discipline with 5 years experience in official Administration / Establishment / Accounts / Audit / Contract Administration. Assistant: Graduate in any discipline with 5 years experience in official Administration / Establishment / Accounts / Audit / Contract Administration. Computer Programmer: Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Computer Programming / Software Development / IT related field. Stenographer (English): Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Stenography / Computer knowledge in Computer preparation of documents / correspondence. Junior Assistant: Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Computer knowledge in Computer preparation of documents / correspondence. Computer Operator: Graduate in any discipline with 3 years experience in Computer knowledge in Computer preparation of documents / correspondence.

salary_details.details: Junior Engineer (Civil): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Electrical): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Planning): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Stores): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Engineer (Billing & Contract): Rs. 30000/- per month Assistant Engineer (Administration): Rs. 40000/- per month Accounts Officer: Rs. 40000/- per month Assistant: Rs. 30000/- per month Computer Programmer: Rs. 30000/- per month Stenographer (English): Rs. 30000/- per month Junior Assistant: Rs. 20000/- per month Computer Operator: Rs. 20000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DPHCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dphc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
